login.title: BILT TRACKER
login.subtitle: Your progress, your pace
login.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up here
login.forgotInfo: Enter your email below and we will send you instructions.
login.hasAccount: Already have an account? Log in

register.usernamePlaceholder: What do they call you at the gym? (Username)

google.comingSoonMsg: We are working hard to bring Google Sign-In. Check back soon!

alerts.includeAt: Make sure to include '@' and domain.
alerts.checkSpam: Check your inbox or SPAM folder.
alerts.minAge: You must be at least 13 years old.

errors.invalidEmail: The email format is invalid. Check for trailing spaces.
errors.userNotFound: We couldn't find an account associated with this email.
errors.emailInUse: This email is already registered to another account. Try logging in.
errors.weakPassword: Password is too weak. Use at least 6 characters.
errors.networkFailed: It seems there is no internet connection. Check your network and try again.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many failed attempts. For your safety, wait a few minutes before trying again.
errors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
